title: Users & Groups
html:
Users & Groups

Inspect

CommandDescription
 
id
current user uid/gid/groups
id alice
for another user
whoami
current username
who
logged-in users
w
logged-in users + what they're running
last | head
recent logins
groups alice
alice's groups
getent passwd alice
full passwd line
cat /etc/passwd /etc/group
raw account/group files

Create / delete / modify

CommandDescription
 
useradd -m -s /bin/bash alice
create with home + shell
passwd alice
set/change password
usermod -aG sudo alice
append to sudo group
usermod -L alice
lock account
usermod -s /usr/sbin/nologin svc
disable interactive login
userdel -r alice
delete user + home
groupadd dev
create group
gpasswd -a alice dev
add alice to dev
gpasswd -d alice dev
remove alice from dev

Password policy

CommandDescription
 
chage -l alice
show password aging info
chage -E 2026-12-31 alice
expire account on date
passwd -e alice
force change on next login
excerpt: Users & Groups Inspect Command Description id current user uid/gid/groups id alice for another user whoami current username who logged-in users w logged-in users + what they're running last | head recent logins groups alice alice's groups getent passwd alice full passwd line cat /etc/passwd /etc/group raw account/group files Create / delete / modify Command Description useradd -m -s /bin/bash alice create with home + shell passwd alice set/change password usermod -aG sudo alice append to sudo group usermod -L alice lock account usermod -s /usr/sbin/nologin svc disable interactive login userdel -r alice delete user + home groupadd dev create group gpasswd -a alice dev add alice to dev gpasswd -d alice dev remove alice from dev Password policy Command Description chage -l alice show password aging info chage -E 2026-12-31 alice expire account on date passwd -e alice force change on next login
